tech_news.title: ASUS Republic of Gamers Announces Strix OLED XG34WCDMS and Strix XG129C - ASUS Pressroom
tech_news.description: ROG announces the Strix OLED XG34WCDMS, a 34-inch 280Hz QD-OLED gaming monitor, and the versatile Strix XG129C secondary touchscreen display. Subscribe to ASUS Pressroom for the latest tech updates!

tech_news.title: RGB LED TVs show color crosstalk issues in Display Week demo - The Verge
tech_news.description: A side-by-side comparison of an RGB LED TV and a QD TV showed color crosstalk and contrast issues in the RGB LED TV.
